description: State dependency graph of Recoil atoms/selectors in src/. Snapshot 2026-04-23.

edgeTypes.get: Selector reads the dependency in its get() function
edgeTypes.set: Writable selector writes the dependency in its set() function
edgeTypes.default: Atom's default points at the other atom/family
edgeTypes.effect: A StateEffectRoot{,Async} or useRecoilTransaction_UNSTABLE writes the target when the source changes
edgeTypes.syncReplica: A useSyncState / useSyncValueToRecoil / useSyncStateThrottled push from source to target
edgeTypes.urlSync: Atom uses urlSyncEffect (recoil-sync) against the 'url-json' store key
edgeTypes.providerValue: Atom is injected as a value into a React context provider

nodes.notes: Recursive read/write through the visibility tree
